dict.string: Aura reads your calendar so the Calendar agent can surface conflicts, travel-time alerts, and the morning brief. Calendar data stays on the device.
Aura reads your calendar so the Calendar agent can surface conflicts, travel-time alerts, and the morning brief. Calendar data stays on the device.
Aura uses contacts only to label senders in your inbox digest. Contact entries are not exported.
Aura reads HRV, sleep, heart rate, and step count to compute your Wellness Load Score on-device. Nothing leaves the device.
Aura does not write to HealthKit.
Aura uses your local Wi-Fi to reach the Mac-side orchestrator bridge and to hand off the current card between your iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Nothing is sent to the internet.
Aura uses your location to compute travel time to your next calendar event. Location is read only when the brief is open.
Aura sends at most three proactive nudges per day, capped by the Silence Budget. You can lower the cap to zero in Settings.
Aura does not track you across apps. This prompt only appears because the SDK linker requires the description string.
